products.name: Minimal Canvas Tote
products.description: Heavy-duty natural canvas with a clean, uncluttered design. Fits a laptop, books, and everything in between.

products.name: Ceramic Pour-Over Set
products.description: Hand-thrown stoneware dripper and carafe. Brews a clean, nuanced cup — slow mornings made beautiful.

products.name: Linen Throw Blanket
products.description: Stone-washed Portuguese linen. Gets softer with every wash. Available in sand, slate, and sage.

products.name: Leather Card Wallet
products.description: Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. Holds 6 cards and folds flat in your front pocket.

products.name: Bamboo Desk Organizer
products.description: Modular bamboo tray system. Configures into 6 layouts — keeps your desk clear without looking sterile.

products.name: Glass Water Bottle
products.description: Borosilicate glass with a silicone sleeve. No plastic taste, no aftertaste. Just water.
